outcome.title: Eval Func
outcome.description: Evaluate a quadratic function.

outcome.title: Discriminant
outcome.description: Find the discriminant.

outcome.title: Solve Quad w Complex
outcome.description: Solve a quadratic equation with complex solutions.

outcome.title: Solve Rad Eq
outcome.description: Solve a radical equation with no extraneous solutions.

outcome.title: Solve Rational Eq
outcome.description: Solve a rational equation with one extraneous solution.

outcome.title: Inverse
outcome.description: Find the inverse of a cube root function.

outcome.title: ASSESSMENT
outcome.description: ASSESSMENT QUESTION :Find the vertex of a quadratic function (projectile motion application).

outcome.title: Composition
outcome.description: Function Composition

outcome.title: Diff Quot
outcome.description: Difference Quotient

outcome.title: Prop of Quad Func
outcome.description: Properties of Quadratic Functions

outcome.title: Sketch Quad Func
outcome.description: Sketching Quadratic Functions

outcome.title: Transformations
outcome.description: Transformations of Functions

outcome.title: Exp to Log Form
outcome.description: Convert between exponential and logarithmic forms

outcome.title: Log Prop
outcome.description: Expand and condense logarithmic expressions using properties of logarithms.

outcome.title: Solve Exp Like Bases
outcome.description: Solve exponential equations with like bases.

outcome.title: Solve Log w Prop
outcome.description: Solve logarithmic equations using properties of logarithms.

outcome.title: Solve Log w 1-1
outcome.description: Solve logarithmic equations using the one-to-one property.

outcome.title: Exp Log App
outcome.description: Solve application problems involving exponential and logarithmic functions.

outcome.title: Graph Log
outcome.description: Graph logarithmic functions.

outcome.title: Graph Exp
outcome.description: Graph exponential functions.

outcome.title: Word System
outcome.description: Solve word problems involving systems of equations.

outcome.title: Write Matrix
outcome.description: Write matrices for systems of equations.

outcome.title: Solve System
outcome.description: Use row operations to solve systems of equations.

outcome.title: Domain Range
outcome.description: Find the domain and range of functions.

outcome.title: Rational Asymp
outcome.description: Find asymptotes of rational functions.

outcome.title: Poly Zeros
outcome.description: Find the zeros of polynomial functions.

outcome.title: Rational Graph
outcome.description: Graph a rational function.

outcome.title: Polynomial Behavior
outcome.description: Determine characteristics of polynomial functions from their graphs.
